samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_32bit">
    <description>Implement a carry-lookahead 32-bit adder.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="S" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit output representing the sum of A and B.</output>
        <output id="C32">Carry-out output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter>Carry</parameter>
        <parameter>Carry lookahead logic is used to calculate the carry outputs based on the carry inputs and the generate and propagate signals.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>Design a carry-lookahead 32-bit adder using the Carry-Lookahead Adder (CLA) architecture. The adder should perform the addition of two 32-bit operands A and B, producing a 32-bit sum S and a carry-out C32. Utilize the carry-lookahead logic to improve the speed of the addition operation by reducing the delay caused by the propagation of carry signals through the bits of the operands.</implementation>
</module>
